title: bidens isostigmatoides
intro: Bidens isostigmatoides, also known as False Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The leaves and flowers of Bidens isostigmatoides have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
